description: fix-skill-completion-loops: 3 aligners 0 miners; agent0=22moves, agent1=14moves+gear+8hearts, agent2=61moves; 0 junctions aligned; navigation BFS deadlock dominant issue

navigation-shake-greedy-gearup: 3 LLM aligners 1 scripted miner; move.success=359/agent move.failed=633/agent; aligner.gained=0.25/agent(1/4 got gear); heart.gained=0.75/agent; 1 junction aligned; max_steps_without_motion=532; 12 LLM timeouts; beats scripted 0.131 baseline
skill-step-timeout: same as nav_shake but more LLM calls (32 timeouts); skill timeout fires but same bottleneck: 2/3 aligners never reach station; was_stuck fix not yet applied
was_stuck-timeout-fix: was_stuck now detects skill timeouts; align_neutral→unstuck override fires; 2 junctions aligned (vs 1 before); still max_stuck=533; 47 LLM timeouts

no-hazard-avoid-when-equipped: skip hazard avoidance in align_neutral/get_heart BFS; 2 junctions aligned; aligner.gained=0.25 (1/4 still); 47 LLM timeouts; same bottleneck: agents can't find path through unexplored territory
greedy-nav-fallback: DEAD CODE BUG - _move_toward_target never returns noop so greedy never called; same result as prev; forget-stuck-junction committed separately

greedy-bfs-fallback+forget-stuck-junction: 9 junctions aligned (vs 2), 3046 held-steps (vs 1054); heart.gained=1.12/agent; 423 moves/agent; forget-stuck-junction and real greedy nav both working; 3x better than scripted baseline!
unstuck_horizon=16 is WORSE: longer unstuck wastes steps; keep unstuck_horizon=4

gear-up-fix-all-aligners: all 3/3 aligners now gear up (aligner.gained=0.38 vs 0.25 before); root cause: BFS targeting blocked station cell + _explore_near_hub sending agent outside hub; fix: _navigate_to_station targets adjacent cell + expected station at hub_center+(4,-3); 357 LLM timeouts; 57.5pct better than prev best 0.40!

get-heart-optimistic-bfs+max-cells-20k: hub visible but BFS failed → optimistic BFS + increased max_cells 5k→20k for 100x100 map; 22 junctions aligned (vs 16), 5894 held-steps (vs 5326); 38 skill timeouts; 351 LLM timeouts; new best 0.69

forget-stuck-junction-after-1-timeout: forget stuck junction on 1st align_neutral timeout (vs 2nd); 10 align_neutral timeouts (vs 38), 10 junctions forgotten+retried; 21 get_heart timeouts; 6122 held-steps (vs 5894) despite 19 aligned (vs 22); 374 LLM timeouts; new best 0.71

get-heart-navigate-to-approach-cell: fix hub nav bug - hub in blocked_cells so BFS failed, now use _navigate_to_station approach; 22 aligned (same), 7982 held-steps (+30% from 6122); heart.gained=5.00/agent (+25%); 14 align_neutral timeouts + 24 get_heart timeouts; 399 LLM timeouts; new best 0.90!

action-timeout-3000ms+miner-optimistic-bfs: increase action_timeout_ms 250→3000; LLM timeouts 399→2 (eliminating 397 wasted noops); miner _move_toward_target adds optimistic BFS through unknown cells; 24 aligned (+2), 8195 held (+213); 24 align_neutral timeouts + 26 get_heart timeouts; new best 0.92!

revert-miner-optimistic-bfs: removing optimistic BFS from miner _move_toward_target catastrophic; 3/5 miners stuck in gear_up/unstuck loops (can't reach miner station); hub depleted so aligners get_heart times out; LLM hallucinating "unstick" skill; aborted early, clearly far worse than 0.92

scout-grid-explore (2A+1S at 2000 steps): BROKEN coordinate system bug - grid targets in wrong space; scout died in 16 moves (stuck 1949 steps); 7 junctions same as baseline; worse than 2000-step baseline 0.490

move-failure-tracking (3A+0S at 2000 steps): track move failures to mark impassable obstacles (extractors etc.) in blocked_cells; agents now 570-600 successful moves vs 462 before; 4117 held vs 2902 baseline (+42%); new 2000-step best 0.612!
move-failure-tracking (2A+1S at 2000 steps): same code but scout config; scout died after 1025 moves (still HP drain issue); 2A+1S worse than 3A+0S (0.581 vs 0.612); use 3A setup
4-aligners (-c 4): 4A+0S at 2000 steps, all aligners; reward=1.19, max_steps_without_motion=11 (near-zero stuck!); heart.gained=1.5/agent (6 total); 6/7 junctions aligned; new best 1.190!

reclaim-enemy-junctions+OOM-fix: align_neutral falls back to enemy junctions; miner move-failure tracking; PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True fixes OOM; reward=1.24, junction.aligned_by_agent=1.50 (6 total), heart.gained=1.50, max_stuck=11.25; new best 1.240!
4aligners-1miner (-c 5 attempt): 5A OOM: 5 agents need >2.7 GiB free; PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF fixed 4A but not 5A; discarded
3aligners-1miner (-c 4): scripted miner deposits resources but insufficient carbon (5<7 needed per heart); no extra hearts crafted; 3A worse than 4A (0.75 vs 1.24); discard
5aligners (-c 5, 4A+1scout): OOM - 5th agent leaves only 2.68 GiB free (need 3 GiB for LLM); hardware limit confirmed at 4 agents max
3aligners-1scout (-c 4, kw.num_aligners=3,kw.num_scouts=1): scout explores map but earns 0 reward; 3 aligners held 6800 steps but per-agent avg diluted; 4A+0S still best at 1.24

early-defend (threshold 2→1, duration 200→1000): defend activates after 1 get_heart timeout; 10378 held (+78) marginal; enemies don't recapture junctions so defending has no effect; real bottleneck: 7th junction unreachable (24 align_neutral timeouts)
forget-stuck-enemy-junction+blacklist: forget unreachable enemy junctions after align_neutral timeout; eliminates 24x timeout loop; confirmed ceiling at 1.24 with 5 hearts/6 alignments
